steps.name: local-bridge-session-protocol
steps.summary: Added a pure agent-design-engine transaction protocol over existing canvas-core operations and a loopback-only Node bridge with ephemeral token auth, project path confinement, guarded revision/hash commits, monotonic event cursors, bounded replay, cursor-gap snapshot recovery, HTTP snapshots/transactions, and WebSocket broadcasts. Verified engine 5/5, bridge 5/5, and both TypeScript builds.

steps.name: terminal-mcp-adapters
steps.summary: Added one official-SDK stdio MCP adapter shared by Codex and Claude actors with get_context, apply_operations, apply_source_patch, verify, and undo tools. Deterministic child-process MCP initialize/list/context/apply/verify/undo passed for both actors; bridge context/verify/guarded undo raised bridge tests to 7/7. Installed Codex recognized one-shot config and installed Claude recognized a temporary project-scoped config as pending approval; no global config was changed and no live model call is claimed.

steps.name: atomic-auto-apply-audit
steps.summary: Implemented trusted auto-apply with duplicate ID, base revision, canonical hash, project allowlist, and source before-hash guards; staged source replacement with injected verification; exact JSON-pointer and lossless source diffs; audit persistence before publication; and guarded operation/source Undo as new revisions. Failure injection proved verification/audit rollback leaves file, document, audit, and cursor unchanged; competing actors reject stale writes. Verified engine 7/7, bridge 11/11, MCP actor contract 2/2, and all builds.

steps.name: canvas-live-sync-file-watcher
steps.summary: Connected the browser canvas to authenticated WebSocket snapshots with cursor replay/recovery, routed connected human operations back through bridge authority, added loopback-only CORS, and implemented allowlisted Node source watching with debounce, supported JSX stable-ID reconciliation, verification, audit, and bridge-write echo suppression. Fresh independent system Chrome proof passed 20/20 revisions with agent ack→visible p95 59.4ms, file edit→visible p95 144.4ms, zero watcher/console errors, and visual screenshot evidence.

steps.name: dual-cli-roundtrip-proof
steps.summary: Completed a fresh React dual-client flow through the real stdio adapter and bridge: Codex operation, stale Claude conflict, Claude source patch, Codex Undo, bridge-down structured error, same-revision restart, and direct-file watcher recovery converged at revision 4 with matching source/context hashes. Installed Codex directly emitted a successful get_context tool event; installed Claude returned the non-prompt document ID and revision through its restricted MCP-only session. Full regression passed core 35/35, engine 9/9, bridge 14/14, MCP 2/2, app 16/16, all builds, live latency validation, and roundtrip validator.
